app.title: Book from the App
app.text: Download our free app. Track your taxi in real-time and manage your bookings easily.

manage.page_subtitle: View or cancel your booking without logging in.
manage.hint: Enter the booking code and the email address used when making the booking.
manage.error: We couldn't find any booking with those details. Please check the code and email address.

contact.page_subtitle: Write to us, call us, or visit our offices. Our team responds in under 24 hours.
contact.form_subtitle: Fill in the form and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.privacy_text: I have read and accept the Privacy Policy and the processing of my data for handling the enquiry.
contact.success_desc: We've received your enquiry. We'll reply within 24 hours to the email provided.
contact.faq_subtitle: Quick answers to the most common questions.
contact.faq_q1: How can I modify my booking?
contact.faq_a1: You can modify your booking in the Manage Booking section by entering your code and email. You can also contact us by phone or WhatsApp and we'll handle the change for you.
contact.faq_q2: What is the free cancellation period?
contact.faq_a2: Cancellations made more than 24 hours in advance are free of charge. For later cancellations, review our terms of service or contact us to assess your specific case.
contact.faq_q3: How do I receive my booking confirmation?
contact.faq_a3: You will receive a confirmation email immediately after completing payment. It will include your booking code, trip details, and your assigned driver's information.
contact.faq_q4: Do you offer vehicles adapted for PRM?
contact.faq_a4: Yes. When booking, you can indicate whether you need assistance or extra space for passengers with reduced mobility. You can also contact us directly to arrange any special requirements.
